creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Using 

USE_QT_VER= 4
QT_COMPONENTS= ... assistant ... 

in a port's Makefile ends up the ports-framework reporting:

[...]
===>   isis-3.3.1 depends on file: /bin/assistant-qt4 - not found
===>    Verifying install for /bin/assistant-qt4 in /usr/ports/devel/qt4-assistant
===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
===>  Extracting for qt4-assistant-4.7.4_1

The port ever and ever build the dependency devel/qt4-assistant.

Fix: 

Not know yet.
How-To-Repeat: Try using a port that is dependend on devel/qt4-assistant. Ensure that USE_QT_VER=4 is set and also set QT4 component variable as shown above containing the component "assistant".
